name: Cash Paradise # 2
description_short: Cash Paradise # 2 is a Miami-based jewelry buyer and pawn shop offering competitive pricing on rings, chains, bracelets, and watches with repair and cleaning services.
description_long:
Cash Paradise # 2 operates as a jewelry retail and collateral-based lending establishment located in the Flagami area of Miami-Dade County, Florida. The business is identified as Latino-owned and explicitly states it "buys used goods," positioning it within the pawn shop category despite its primary online categorization as a jewelry store. The company has maintained operations at 3933 NW 7th St since at least April 2026, according to available records.

The business offers a comprehensive range of jewelry products including wedding rings, chains, bracelets, and watches, alongside value-added services such as watch battery replacements, jewelry cleaning, and repair work. Cash Paradise # 2 emphasizes competitive pricing and positions itself as one of the most affordable jewelry retailers in the local area. The store maintains extended hours (9 A.M.–8 P.M. weekdays, 10 A.M.–4 P.M. Sundays) and accepts multiple payment methods including credit cards, debit cards, NFC mobile payments, and checks. The business also offers same-day delivery service and maintains accessibility features including wheelchair-accessible entrance, seating, and parking.

The business distinguishes itself through customer service emphasis, with aggregated reviews highlighting attentive staff, a welcoming atmosphere, and personalized assistance. The company has obtained quality ratings of 8.7 for quality, 8.8 for price, 9.0 for customer service, and 8.5 for product variety. Cash Paradise # 2 also markets itself as LGBTQ+ friendly and maintains a transgender safe space. However, the business profile notes that "the owner or a representative of this business has not yet completed the verification process," indicating unconfirmed ownership details.

While customer sentiment is described as "overwhelmingly positive," the aggregated review summary acknowledges that availability may vary during peak times and notes occasional challenges with specific jewelry repairs or communication. The lack of actual verified customer reviews (zero reviews currently published) and unverified business status creates uncertainty about actual service delivery consistency. This business primarily serves local jewelry shoppers and those seeking collateral-based lending through asset sales rather than traditional credit products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Buys used jewelry and goods, providing immediate liquidity for customers needing quick cash
Extended weekday hours (9 A.M.–8 P.M.) with Saturday availability suit working customers
Multiple payment methods accepted including NFC mobile payments and checks
Same-day delivery service available for purchased items
Wheelchair-accessible entrance, seating, and parking accommodate mobility-limited customers
Offers on-site jewelry repair and watch maintenance services beyond basic buying/selling
Identified as Latino-owned and explicitly markets as LGBTQ+ friendly with transgender safe space designation
Competitive pricing emphasized in aggregated reviews with quality rating of 8.8 for price value
cons: Business verification incomplete—owner has not verified business information with platform, raising transparency concerns
Zero published customer reviews despite 2+ years of operation, preventing independent validation of service quality claims
Aggregated reviews note occasional communication problems and challenges with specific jewelry repairs
Product and service availability noted as variable during peak/busy periods
No transparent pricing or fee structure published online for collateral loans or buying services
best_for: Miami-area residents seeking immediate cash through jewelry or used goods sales
Customers needing affordable jewelry repair, watch battery replacement, or cleaning services
LGBTQ+ and transgender individuals seeking inclusive retail environment
Budget-conscious jewelry shoppers prioritizing competitive pricing over brand names
diagnosis: Cash Paradise # 2 is best suited for Miami residents needing quick cash through jewelry sales or requiring affordable jewelry repair services, particularly those valuing inclusive, customer-friendly service in their local area. The primary caveat is the complete lack of verified customer reviews and unconfirmed business ownership status, making it impossible to independently validate the aggregated service quality claims or lending terms before engaging with the business.
services: Buys used jewelry and collateral goods for cash
Sells new and pre-owned wedding rings
Accepts credit cards, debit cards, and NFC mobile payments
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
